title: Japan Anime Shoten
welcome: Delivering Japanese Anime Figures to the World
search_try_different: Try different keywords or check the spelling.
offer_hint: Found a lower price elsewhere? Feel free to offer your price! Reasonable negotiations are welcome.
offer_submitted_message: We'll review your offer and get back to you via email.
offer_error_too_high: Offer must be lower than the current price.
offer_error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
hero_subtitle: Delivering authentic products sourced directly from authorized channels, from rare figures to the latest merchandise.
hero_subtitle_1: Fresh arrivals of the hottest anime figures.
hero_subtitle_2: We stock hard-to-find limited editions and rare merchandise.
hero_subtitle_3: Fast and reliable shipping directly from Japan to your doorstep.
shop_intro_text: Japan Anime Shoten is your premier destination for authentic anime figures, trading cards, and exclusive merchandise. Sourced directly from Tokyo, we ensure every item is 100% genuine and shipped with care.
footer_subscribe_text: Subscribe to get special offers, free giveaways, and once-in-a-lifetime deals.

content: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not satisfied, we offer returns and refunds under the following conditions.

sections.title: Return Eligibility
content: Returns are accepted if contacted within 14 days of delivery.
Items must be unopened and in original condition.
Original packaging, accessories, and tags must be intact.
Proof of purchase (order number) is required.
Why 14 days? We understand international shipping takes time. We provide 14 days to ensure you have enough time to inspect your item upon arrival.

sections.title: Return Shipping Costs
content: Customer's responsibility for standard returns.
Our responsibility for defective, damaged, or incorrect items.

sections.title: Non-Returnable Items
content: Items where 15 or more days have passed since delivery.
Items that have been opened or used.
Items damaged or soiled by customer handling.
Sale items or special price items marked as 'Final Sale - No Returns'.
Items without original packaging or missing accessories.

sections.title: Refund Timeline
content: Notify us: Contact within 14 days of delivery.
Ship back: Send item within 7 days after receiving return address.
Inspection: We inspect within 3 business days of receiving return.
Refund processed: Within 5-7 business days after inspection.
Money in account: 3-10 business days depending on your payment method.

sections.title: Refund Amount
content: Full refund: Unopened items in perfect condition.
Partial refund: Items with minor packaging damage (evaluated case-by-case).
No refund: Opened items, damaged items due to customer mishandling.
Note: Original shipping costs are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.

sections.title: Refund Method
content: Refunds are issued to the original payment method.
Credit card refunds: 3-10 business days.
PayPal refunds: 1-3 business days.

sections.title: Defective or Damaged Items 🛡️
content: We take full responsibility for defective or damaged items.
Contact us within 14 days of delivery.
We will provide a full refund or free replacement (your choice).
We cover all return shipping costs.
No restocking fees.

subsections.title: Required Evidence
content: Photos or videos showing the damage or defect.
Clear images of the item, packaging, and shipping label.
Description of the issue.
Tip: Take photos/videos when you open the package. This helps us resolve issues faster.

sections.title: Incorrect Items 📦
content: If we sent you the wrong item:
Contact us within 14 days of delivery.
We will send the correct item at no additional cost.
You can keep or return the incorrect item (your choice).
Free return shipping provided.

sections.title: Return Process
content: Step 1: Contact us at japan.anime.shoten@gmail.com with your order number, item name/SKU, reason for return, and photos (if defective/damaged).
Step 2: We will review your request within 24-48 hours. You will receive a Return Authorization (RA) number and return shipping address.
Step 3: Pack the item securely in original packaging. Include the RA number on the package. Ship to the provided address and keep your tracking number.
Step 4: We inspect within 3 business days. Refund processed within 5-7 business days. Email confirmation sent when refund is issued.
Important: Do not ship items back without an RA number. Unauthorized returns may not be accepted.

sections.title: Exchanges
content: We currently do not offer direct exchanges.
If you want a different item: Return the original item for a refund, then place a new order for the item you want.
Note: We are working on a direct exchange system for the future.

sections.title: Lost or Damaged in Transit 📬
content: If your package is lost: Contact us if tracking shows no movement for 30 days. We will investigate with the shipping carrier. Full refund or replacement provided after investigation.
If your package is damaged in transit: Contact us within 14 days with photos of damaged packaging. We will file a claim with the carrier. Full refund or replacement provided.
You are not responsible for carrier errors.

sections.title: Customs-Related Returns ⚠️
content: If you refuse customs fees: Item will be returned to us. Refund minus all shipping costs (original + return). Restocking fee may apply.
If package is seized by customs: We are not responsible for customs seizures. No refunds for items seized due to local regulations. Please check your country's import restrictions before ordering.

sections.title: Special Circumstances
content: Buyer's remorse (changed your mind): Returns accepted within 14 days. Item must be unopened. Return shipping paid by customer. Full refund (minus original shipping).
Pre-order cancellations: Can cancel anytime before item ships. Full refund provided. Once shipped, standard return policy applies.

sections.title: Contact Us
content: Email: japan.anime.shoten@gmail.com
Business Hours: Weekdays 10:00-18:00 (Japan Time)
Closed: Weekends and Japanese national holidays
Response Time: We aim to respond within 24-48 hours

sections.title: Our Commitment 💙
content: Customer satisfaction is our priority.
We handle all return requests fairly and quickly.
Communication in English, Chinese, Korean, Thai, and Japanese.
We're here to help resolve any issues.
Thank you for shopping with us!

sections.title: Shipping Methods
content: International Destinations:
Asia, Europe, Canada, UK: Japan Post International ePacket Light or EMS (Express Mail Service)
USA: Commercial courier service (DHL, FedEx, or similar)
All items come with a tracking number
Note: Due to current postal restrictions, we use commercial courier services for shipments to the United States. This ensures reliable and trackable delivery.

sections.title: Shipping Time
content: Orders are shipped within 5-7 business days after confirmation.
Delivery time after shipment:
Asia: 7-12 days
USA (courier): 5-10 days
Europe/Canada/UK: 10-16 days
Delivery times may vary depending on the destination country or region.
Delays may occur during busy seasons or due to customs inspections.

sections.title: Tracking
content: A tracking number will be sent via email after shipment.
For Asia/Europe/Canada/UK: Track via Japan Post Tracking Service.
For USA: Track via courier company website (DHL, FedEx, etc.).
Tracking is also available via your local postal service.

sections.title: Shipping Cost
content: All shipping costs are included in product prices.
Shipping will be displayed as 0 JPY at checkout.
No additional shipping fees at checkout.

sections.title: Shipping Destinations
content: We currently ship to the following countries/regions:
Americas: USA, Canada
Europe: UK, France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Netherlands, Belgium, Austria, Portugal, Ireland, Greece
Asia: Taiwan, China, South Korea, Thailand, Singapore
Please contact us for shipping to other countries.

sections.title: Customs & Import Taxes ⚠️
content: IMPORTANT: Customs duties and import taxes are NOT included in product prices.
Customs duties or import taxes may apply depending on your country's regulations.
All customs and import taxes are the buyer's responsibility.
You will be required to pay these fees directly to customs or the delivery carrier upon receipt.

subsections.title: 🇺🇸 USA
content: No duty-free threshold (eliminated August 2025)
All shipments subject to customs duties: 0-7%
Processing fees: $5-30 per package
Most figure imports from Japan: 0% duty + processing fees

subsections.title: 🇨🇦 Canada
content: Tax-free up to C$20 only
Duty: 0-8% above threshold
GST: 5% (always applied)
PST/HST: 5-15% (varies by province)
Typical total: 10-28% on most orders

subsections.title: 🇬🇧 UK
content: Tax-free up to £135 (until December 31, 2026)
Duty: 0-4.5% above threshold
VAT: 20% (on orders above £135)
Note: Duty exemption will be removed by March 2029

subsections.title: 🇪🇺 European Union
content: Tax-free up to €150 (transitioning to full duty by 2028)
VAT: 19-27% (varies by country)
Germany: 19%, France: 20%, Italy: 22%, Spain: 21%

subsections.title: 🇨🇳 China
content: Tax-free up to ¥50 only ($7 USD)
Duty applies to almost all orders: 13-25%
Customs clearance is strict

subsections.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan
content: Tax-free up to NT$2,000 ($62 USD)
Duty: 5-10% above threshold
Relatively lenient customs

subsections.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea
content: Tax-free up to $150
Duty: 8%
VAT: 10%
Typical total: 18% on orders above $150

subsections.title: 🇹🇭 Thailand
content: Tax-free up to ฿1,500 ($43 USD)
Duty: 0-30% (varies significantly)
VAT: 7%
Customs enforcement varies

sections.title: Important Notes
content: The above information is accurate as of February 2026.
Customs regulations change frequently - please check with your local customs for the latest information.
If you refuse to pay customs fees, the item will be returned to us.
Return shipping costs and re-shipment fees will be charged to the customer.
We are not responsible for any customs-related delays or confiscations.
Processing fees charged by carriers are separate from duties and taxes.

sections.title: Undeliverable Items
content: Items returned due to unknown address or refusal of receipt will be returned to us.
Items returned due to refusal to pay customs duties will be subject to restocking fees.
Additional shipping fees are required for reshipment.
This also applies to returns due to long-term absence.

sections.title: Shipping Inquiries
content: Please contact: japan.anime.shoten@gmail.com
Include the following information:
Your order number
Tracking number
Description of the issue
Business Hours: Weekdays 10:00-18:00 (Japan Time)
Closed: Weekends and Japanese national holidays

This is used solely for order processing and shipping.

We are not responsible for confiscation or damage at customs.
Products may not work properly depending on your environment.

about.title: Our Story
about.tagline: From Osaka, bringing Japan's treasures to your collection
paragraphs: We want to deliver Japanese anime culture to fans around the world with uncompromising quality — Japan Anime Shoten was born from this passion.

Based in Osaka, one of the world's greatest pop culture hubs, we operate at the heart of Japan's anime scene. From the vast domestic distribution market, our expert curators carefully select rare figures, trading cards, and limited-edition goods.
We are not just a retailer — as fellow fans who share your passion, we take pride in being the bridge that connects authentic Japanese goods to doorsteps around the world.

authenticity.title: Authenticity Guarantee
authenticity.intro: At Japan Anime Shoten, we strictly eliminate all counterfeit and bootleg products. Every item we carry is exclusively selected from domestically distributed genuine products within Japan.

features.title: 🔍 Expert Procurement
features.desc: Our specialized staff personally verifies each item — checking license seals, paint precision, and packaging specifications before purchase.

features.title: ✅ Dual Inspection System
features.desc: We conduct rigorous condition checks twice — once at procurement and again before shipping — for a total of two thorough inspections.

features.title: 💰 Full Refund Guarantee
features.desc: In the unlikely event that a delivered product is proven to be non-genuine, we will immediately issue a full refund including shipping costs.

authenticity.closing: We will never betray the trust of customers who believe in the quality of Japan's collector market.

wholesale.title: Wholesale
wholesale.tagline: Your business partner for sourcing Japanese exclusives
wholesale.intro: We offer wholesale services for shops, online stores, and event vendors around the world.

features.title: 📦 Bulk Discounts
features.desc: Flexible pricing based on order quantity. The more you order, the better the deal.

features.title: 🎯 Request & Sourcing
features.desc: We also offer a procurement agent service to track down specific limited-edition items and rare goods from the Japanese market.

features.title: 🌍 Safe International Shipping
features.desc: With tracked and insured shipping, you can receive even large bulk orders with complete peace of mind.

wholesale.closing: Leveraging our Osaka-based network, we are here to powerfully support your business.

footer_copyright: © 2026 Japan Anime Shoten. All rights reserved.
